title: List an item | eBay
memory: The listing form is now fully visible, including the "Pricing" and "Delivery" sections. I have scrolled through most of the page and can now identify the major sections and fields for documentation.

extract.query: List every input field, dropdown, button, and interactive element. For each, identify its label, whether it's required (if indicated), its section/group (e.g., Photos, Pricing, Delivery), the order from top to bottom, and visible dropdown options. Identify the final publish button text and any popups or blockers.
